Organization

Chain of Command

Make Sure to follow the chain of command Lineup

Leadership

Make sure to follow the chain of command lineup. Direct your questions to lower command first; if they can’t help, then escalate to the high command team.

SAA Heads

Role Name/Callsign Discord

Assistant Chief Executive Officer AC-02 | Metal metal.alt
Deputy Chief Executive Officer N/A N/A
